purpose: Operator-safe privileged handoff bundle for the remaining eeepc subagent telemetry blocker on the active /home/opencode bridge/runtime path.

overlay_or_copy.operator_note: Use the archive for a clean overlay; use the single live file only if a surgical copy is required.

verification_commands:
sudo python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('/var/lib/eeepc-agent/self-evolving-agent/state/subagents')
files = sorted(root.glob('*.json'), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime if p.exists() else 0)
if not files:
    raise SystemExit(f'no telemetry files found in {root}')
print(files[-1])
PY

success_conditions: active checkout is f14d33c or later containing it
at least one JSON file appears under the canonical host telemetry root
the newest JSON file can be read as durable subagent telemetry

operator_safety: Do not widen scope if overlay or restart fails.
Do not claim success until a JSON file exists under the canonical host telemetry root.
Keep the change bounded to the one live state-root fix and its restart/verify sequence.
